source: RR4W KML (processed): LineStrings greedy-chained by nearest endpoint, then longest run with edges capped at 700 m to drop telemetry spikes. Re-run import_rr4w_moab_kml.py after RR4W updates.

trail_meta.notes: Sand Flats fee area; bypass-heavy weekday flavor of Hell’s Revenge.
Tusher / Potash corridor context on moab-trails.html.
Potash Rd (SR 279) approach; do not confuse with “Where Eagles Dare” add-on.
